hallucination.worst_question: Thuế GTGT của hàng hóa mua vào trong kỳ là bao nhiêu?

recommendations: 32.7% questions have retrieval gaps. Consider: improve chunking, add BM25, increase RERANK_TOP_K.
26.9% questions have noisy context. Consider: stricter reranking, metadata filtering.
44.2% questions show hallucination. Consider: tighter prompt, lower temperature, add citations.
23.1% questions have irrelevant answers. Consider: improve prompt template, add query rewriting.
